name: Meerwaardebelasting
description: A wealthfolio addon to track the meerwaardebelasting for Belgium
author: wolfderechter

permissions.purpose: Fetch accounts to apply per-account FIFO tracking
Fetch buy and sell transactions for capital gains calculation
Fetch closing price on 31 December 2025 (snapshot moment)
Look up historical exchange rates for EUR conversion
Register navigation item and route in the sidebar
